expectations.evidence: report.html exists and contains a complete 260-line HTML document with proper structure
report.csv exists with 70 data rows covering all evaluation items

expectations.text: Report contains accessibility section (Section A / 접근성)
expectations.evidence: HTML contains 'A. 접근성 (KWCAG2.2 33항목 + 시맨틱 HTML 7항목)' section header with class header-a11y

expectations.text: Report contains SEO & Web Performance section (Section B)
expectations.evidence: HTML contains 'B. SEO & Web Performance (Technical SEO 11항목 + Page Experience 18항목)' section header

expectations.text: All 33 KWCAG2.2 items are evaluated (none skipped)
expectations.evidence: All items A-01 through A-33 are present in both HTML and CSV, each with a result (pass/fail/partial/NA/unknown)

expectations.text: All SEO items (SEO-01 through SEO-11) are evaluated
expectations.evidence: SEO-01 through SEO-11 all present in HTML table and CSV rows 42-52

expectations.text: All WP items (WP-01 through WP-18) are evaluated
expectations.evidence: WP-01 through WP-18 all present in HTML table and CSV rows 53-70

expectations.text: Failed items include specific issue descriptions with file/line references
expectations.evidence: Failed items reference specific locations, e.g. A-17: 'dashboard.tsx:23-39', A-23: 'dashboard.tsx:29-36', A-32: 'dashboard.tsx:45-47', WP-04: 'dashboard.tsx:50', WP-09: 'dashboard.tsx:12-13'

expectations.text: Fix guide section exists with concrete code-level recommendations
expectations.evidence: HTML contains '수정 가이드' section with 8 fix-items (A-17, A-23, A-32, WP-04, WP-05, WP-09, WP-12, WP-18), each with code snippets showing exact fixes
HTML lang='ko', title '웹 품질 종합 감사 리포트', all item names and descriptions in Korean (e.g. '적절한 대체 텍스트', '자막 제공', '반복 영역 건너뛰기')

expectations.text: Accessibility findings include specific KWCAG item IDs and line references
expectations.evidence: Findings use KWCAG item IDs (A-01 through A-33) with line references like 'dashboard.tsx:50', 'dashboard.tsx:29-36', 'dashboard.tsx:45-47', 'dashboard.tsx:23-39'

expectations.text: Performance findings include code-level analysis (layout thrashing, lazy loading, etc.)
expectations.evidence: WP-09 identifies layout thrashing: 'offsetHeight 읽기 후 즉시 style.minHeight 쓰기, 이중 reflow 발생' at dashboard.tsx:12-13. WP-05 flags missing loading='lazy' at dashboard.tsx:50. WP-12 identifies LCP delay from 'useEffect + setTimeout(500ms)' at dashboard.tsx:17-19. WP-18 identifies CLS risk from dynamic content insertion.
